arts.ttl: Real Madrid sweating on Kylian Mbappe ahead of Madrid derby after injury scare
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been left sweating ahead of their derby against Atletico Madrid on Sunday after Kylian Mbappe was forced off against Alaves with a thigh problem - with the player set to undergo tests

arts.ttl: Preview: Celta Vigo vs. Atletico Madrid - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's La Liga clash between Celta Vigo and Atletico Madrid, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Injury update provided on Celta Vigo star Óscar Mingueza
arts.sum: An update on the wellbeing of Celta Vigo star Óscar Mingueza has on Tuesday come to the fore online. This comes after the defender set alarm bells ringing across the…
